data.acceptance:
- `src/components/agent-history-utils.tsx` no longer contains a parallel implementation of agent label formatting.
- All callers use `formatAgentDisplayLabel` and/or `parseAgentDisplayParts` from `src/lib/agent-identity.ts`.
- `grep -rn "function buildAgentLabel\|const buildAgentLabel" src/` returns zero hits OR the function is a one-line passthrough.
- Existing tests for the agent history view still pass.
